scripts.clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:releases
scripts.compile: npm run icon:build && npm run icon:font && npm run template:seed && npm run template:scss && npm run template:css && npm run clean:deps && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run bundle:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run bundle:renderer
scripts.compile:release: npm run icon:build && npm run icon:font && npm run template:seed && npm run template:scss && npm run template:css && npm run clean:deps && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run bundle:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run bundle:renderer
scripts.build:mac: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:mac:x64: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.build:mac:arm64: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build:win: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestwin
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestwin
scripts.build:linux: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --linux --arm64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.build:linux:ci: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.build:linux:arm64:ci: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm --arm64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.build:linux:ci:full: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm snap pacman --x64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.build:linux:arm64:ci:full: npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm pacman --arm64 --publish never && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.build:all: npm run clean:releases && npm run compile:release && npm run script:build:patch-peers && electron-builder -mwl --x64 && npm run script:build:fixlatestwin && npm run script:build:fixlatestlinux
scripts.test:emoji: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/emoji.test.ts src/common/emoji.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/emoji.test.js
scripts.test:emoji:github: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/emoji_github.test.ts src/common/emoji.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/emoji_github.test.js
scripts.test:markdown-path: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/markdown_path_resolution.test.ts src/common/markdown_path.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/markdown_path_resolution.test.js
scripts.test:markdown-rendering: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/markdown_rendering_helpers.test.ts src/common/markdown_render_helpers.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/markdown_rendering_helpers.test.js
scripts.test:markdown-table: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/markdown_table.test.ts src/common/markdown_table.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/markdown_table.test.js
scripts.test:markdown: npm run -s test:markdown-path && npm run -s test:markdown-rendering && npm run -s test:markdown-table
scripts.test:global-config: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/global_config.test.ts src/common/global_config.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/global_config.test.js
scripts.test:katex-ranges: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/katex_ranges.test.ts src/common/katex_ranges.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/katex_ranges.test.js
scripts.test:code-fence-suggestions: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/code_fence_suggestions.test.ts src/common/code_fence_suggestions.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/code_fence_suggestions.test.js
scripts.test:natural-sort: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/natural_sort.test.ts src/common/natural_sort.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/natural_sort.test.js
scripts.test:plantuml: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/plantuml.test.ts src/common/plantuml.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/plantuml.test.js
scripts.test:plantuml-cache: npx tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp/tests scripts/tests/plantuml_cache.test.ts src/common/plantuml_sqlite_cache.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/scripts/tests/plantuml_cache.test.js
scripts.test: npm run -s test:emoji && npm run -s test:markdown && npm run -s test:global-config && npm run -s test:katex-ranges && npm run -s test:code-fence-suggestions && npm run -s test:natural-sort && npm run -s test:plantuml && npm run -s test:plantuml-cache
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:9080 dist/main/main.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_WEBPACK_WDS_PORT=9080 electron .
scripts.dev: npm run icon:font && npm run template:seed && npm run template:scss && concurrently -k "npm:template:seed:watch" "npm:template:scss:watch" "npm:template:css:watch" "npm:dev:main" "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:dev:electron"
scripts.prod: npm run compile:release && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir && open releases/mac/*.app

snap.summary: The markdown-based note-taking app that doesn't suck.
